description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Feelpp PKG CI that runs on push to the develop branch and can be triggered manually with a workflow dispatch. The workflow should accept two inputs: dist (a choice of Linux distribution) and parallel (a number of parallel jobs). Run a self-pkg job with a matrix strategy across multiple Linux distributions, setting environment variables for the distribution, parallel build options, and C/C++ compilers. For each matrix entry, conditionally run a step that prints a message indicating which distribution is being built.
